summary: Good‑quality master‑tape source captures a ridiculously good summer ’90 performance, though only vague recording details are provided.
review: Reviewers rave about the musical level of this show, calling it “ridiculously good” and suggesting it deserves release over the Spring ’90 box set. One reviewer notes that they own the original master tapes and have transferred them, implying a solid source, but no concrete comments on clarity or mix are given. A third cryptic comment with a zero‑star rating adds some uncertainty, resulting in an overall mixed sentiment.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on the performance (5‑star review) offsets limited technical detail and a low‑rating, ambiguous comment; overall rating reflects good show quality with assumed decent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer mentions having the original master tapes and transferring them, suggesting a solid source, but no explicit comments on clarity, balance, or issues are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list commentary; reviewers describe the overall show as exceptionally strong and cohesive.
